Yujin Xingzhe

Embers

734 6.75 20250612 Yujin Xingzhe
Jun 12, 2025 15 eps, 21 min
Action Sci-Fi
Yujin Xingzhe

In a quiet village, a young boy named Duanmu Yeyu was once saved by the elite “Hell Hunters” of Ember City. Deeply inspired by these heroes, he vowed to one day become a Hell Hunter himself. As he boards a bus to Ember City to chase his dream, Yeyu is unknowingly swept into a storm of chaos. The main antagonist, Lucifer, sends a bioengineered operative named MIKO-Taiyi to infiltrate Ember City and steal classified data. During a fierce battle with the Hell Hunters, Taiyi is severely injured and falls unconscious. Yeyu stumbles upon Taiyi and, unaware of Taiyi's identity, brings Taiyi back to the Hell Hunters’ base for treatment. In the process, Yeyu unintentionally takes a critical mission device from Taiyi. As Yeyu begins his long-awaited trial to join the Hell Hunters, his innocent act sets off a chain reaction. Taiyi, desperate to avoid detection by Ember City forces, must covertly approach Yeyu and retrieve the device. Meanwhile, Lucifer dispatches tens of thousands of minions to locate the missing Taiyi. Thus begins a citywide conflict, sparked by a small act of kindness, that threatens to become a battle for Ember City’s very survival. (Source: iQIYI)

StudioD.ROCK-ART
SourceNovel

With his abundant fortune, Chu Tiange managed to get the fanciest gear, the most powerful weapons, and the class with the most advantages. For other players, Chu Tiange is a walking Boss disguised as a player. And for the Bosses, Chu Tiange is the mighty and fearsome Archaean Dragonking. May 13, 2025 10 eps, 16 min
Action
Da Xia Qing Shang Gong

Fifty years ago, the martial arts world was suddenly invaded by "chaos." Murong Qiong formed a demon sect to fight against it, but they could not win despite the hard battle. The messenger of God Yi Zhihua came and taught everyone the demonization skills to successfully defeat the chaos. But the messenger of God left, and the demonization skills were introduced into the martial arts world and got out of control. Murong Qiong was disappointed and retired. His subordinate Yu Huabing took the opportunity to take over, improved the demonization skills, and created the punk invigoration era, making the martial arts world prosperous, but the price was that the martial artists all became "superior martial arts monsters." Dongfang Sheng, a young man with a pure heart, found Murong Qiong who had retired to the Xiangxi Hotel, hoping to rely on him to restore the former glory of the martial arts world. Thus this ridiculous story begins... (Source: Bilibili, translated)

219 0 20250415 Lao Ma Yu Xiao Bai
Apr 15, 2025 60 eps, 4 min
Action Comedy Sci-Fi
Lao Ma Yu Xiao Bai

Lao Ma, whose full name is Ma Lei and whose online name is "Ma Mou Ren", is a well-known game planner. Many of his mobile games have dominated the top of the "Lemon Best-selling" TOP list for many years. Lao Ma's production style is actually not well received in the game circle, but big companies are still flocking to him, and the core lies in the word traffic. Lao Ma's games have no breakthroughs in mechanism, and most of the games he planned are just reskins, but Lao Ma has a deep grasp of people's hearts, and often a simple small change can make players enjoy krypton gold. On an ordinary and easy-going morning in 2021, this well-known planner was fatefully transported into the mobile game world he designed himself. At first, he went smoothly with his understanding of the game, but gradually things began to collapse more and more. The bad design he made in order to cheat produced all kinds of amazing and strange changes. In addition to Lao Ma himself "enjoying" all this, there is also a new finger named "Xiao Bai" beside him... (Source: Bilibili, translated)

SourceOriginal

Wo de Shizun Shi Wukong

My Mentor is Wukong

205 0 20250430 Wo de Shizun Shi Wukong
Apr 30, 2025 11 eps, 6 min
Action Adventure Fantasy
Wo de Shizun Shi Wukong

Yuan Huai participated in his family's trials, but during the trials, villains stole his chance to cultivate immortality. His mother was murdered, his sister was kidnapped, and he himself was severely injured and thrown off a cliff. On the verge of death at the bottom of the cliff, he encountered Sun Wukong, who had been suppressed under Five Fingers Mountain ten thousand years ago. He gained the opportunity to become Sun Wukong's disciple and was reborn. He escaped from the bottom of the cliff to avenge his mother, and with Sun Wukong's help, he entered the immortal realm and embarked on the path of cultivating immortality to save his sister. (Source: Tencent, translated)

3467 7.62 20250627 Motokare to wa Dekinakatta Sex Shitemo Ii desu ka?
Jun 27, 2025 1 ep, 30 min
Hentai
Motokare to wa Dekinakatta Sex Shitemo Ii desu ka?

Mia, a cute and passionate gamer girl recently ended her relationship with her boyfriend due to the lack of intimacy in their sex life. Feeling unsatisfied and frustrated, Mia opens up about her situation to her close gaming friend, who is also dealing with his own romantic frustrations. What starts as a simple, honest conversation between two friends soon takes an unexpected and steamy turn, as both Mia and her gaming buddy explore desires they've been suppressing.

Tonari no Kanojo

2695 6.55 20250627 Tonari no Kanojo
Jun 27, 2025 1 ep, 16 min
Hentai
Tonari no Kanojo

Kyoko and Suji are neighbors. They grew up together, shared bitterness and joy together, and are already more than friends to each other. But the boy is not sure of his desires and does not dare to make the first step. One day the friends foolishly quarrel. Kyoko disappeared for a few days, and worried about her absence, Suji received a videotape in the mail. In the video, the unknown man showed Kyoko how to build a strong relationship with a girl. The boy turns the video on as an insecure young man, but turns it off as a man who knows what he wants.

Kuro Gal à la Carte

Rina, a gyaru girl, has a very peculiar relationship with Zen, her childhood friend. She forces him to dress as a bear, just like they did when they were kids. Everything changes when Zen decides to put an end to their arrangement and tells her he no longer wants to continue with that kind of relationship. Desperate, Rina confesses her true feelings of love for him. This moment marks the beginning of a passionate life together.

Kobayashi-san Chi no Maid Dragon: Samishigariya no Ryuu

Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid: A Lonely Dragon Wants to be Loved

54245 8.34 20250627 Kobayashi-san Chi no Maid Dragon: Samishigariya no Ryuu
Jun 27, 2025 1 ep, 105 min
Slice of Life Supernatural
Kobayashi-san Chi no Maid Dragon: Samishigariya no Ryuu

Miss Kobayashi, Tohru, Kanna, and Iruru's peaceful lives are shattered when Kanna's father, Kamun Kamui, leader of the Chaos Forces, arrives and forces her to return to the Dragon World to fix a past mistake. With a war brewing between Chaos and Harmony, Kanna must find a way to unite the two worlds but is torn between her loyalty to her friends and her father's demands. Miss Kobayashi, however, refuses to let her go and tries to mend Kanna and Kamui's broken bond. As dragons clash, Iruru uncovers a hidden force manipulating the war. Can they stop the war before it consumes both worlds? (Source: Crunchyroll)

Virgin Punk: Clockwork Girl

36921 7.21 20250627 Virgin Punk: Clockwork Girl
Jun 27, 2025 1 ep, 35 min
Action Sci-Fi
Virgin Punk: Clockwork Girl

Conditions for Receiving Bounty: Bring the brain of a wanted criminal possessing illegal Somadea to the authorities. Whether the target is alive or dead...is irrelevant. The year is 2099. Humanity has advanced, overcoming all injuries and illnesses with the development of the Medical Android Technology "Somadea." However, along with the development of Somadea, crimes misusing said technology have rapidly increased. Somadea grants physical abilities far superior to those of normal flesh and blood, and by illegally modifying it, Somadea can be misused for criminal purposes. To deal with these Somadea crimes, the government established the Bounty Hunter System. Civilians registered as bounty hunters are permitted to kill illegal Somadea users designated as wanted criminals by the police. In return, they are rewarded with large amounts of bounty money. In this unforgiving world, Ubu Kamigori makes a living hunting down criminals as a bounty hunter. But one day, when she returns home from a job, she finds the man with whom she has a sordid history waiting there—Mr. Elegance. And so, her destiny begins to unravel. A tale woven by mechanical girls and the smell of gunpowder smoke, this suspenseful action begins! (Source: Aniplex of America)

SourceOriginal

Meitantei Conan Movie 28: Sekigan no Flashback

Detective Conan Movie 28: One-Eyed Flashback

7982 7.65 20250418 Meitantei Conan Movie 28: Sekigan no Flashback
Apr 18, 2025 1 ep, 108 min
Mystery
Meitantei Conan Movie 28: Sekigan no Flashback

The twenty-eighth Meitantei Conan movie. An old friend of Mouri Kogoro reopens an investigation of the incident that caused the scars on Inspector Yamato's face. This time not only Nagano's police involved, but Tokyo MPD, CSICE and PSB are involved not forgetting of course Edogawa Conan, the detective boys and the sleeping detective, in a plot full of assassination attempts. In the cold winter of Nagano, Conan has the job of finding the truth behind the incident 10 months ago, that lead to Yamato's face injury, as well as the murder and murders attempts that followed. For that he will count with the precious help of the Nagano police team, Mouri's shooting skills and the PSB knowledge.

Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku

Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: The Immortal Bloodline

5361 6.81 20250627 Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku
Jun 27, 2025 1 ep, 93 min
Action Adventure Comedy Mystery
Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku

Lupin III and his friends head for the Bermuda Sea, aiming for a "mysterious island" that does not exist on the world map. The goal is to uncover the identity of the mastermind who has been sending assassins to the island and to uncover the vast treasure that is hidden there. However, just as they approach the island, their plane is shot down by snipers, and the group crash-lands on an island of death. What they find there is an end-of-the-world landscape of piles of decaying weapons and nuclear missiles, and "garbage men" who were once used as weapons but have been discarded, roaming the streets. The island is shrouded in fog, filled with a poison that can kill within 24 hours, and there is no escape. The ruler of the island, Muom, is determined to rule the world by selection and elimination under the banner of immortality. Faced with a "deathless enemy" who cannot be killed with a gun or a sword, Lupin puts his past, and his pride as a thief on the line in a battle of wits. Will Lupin be able to steal everything within 24 hours and escape the island alive? (Source: Lupin Wiki)

StudioTelecom Animation Film
SourceManga
ThemeAdult Cast
DemographicSeinen

Dragon Heart: Reikai Tanbouki

Dragon Heart: Adventures Beyond This World

1370 0 20250523 Dragon Heart: Reikai Tanbouki
May 23, 2025 1 ep, 119 min
Fantasy
Dragon Heart: Reikai Tanbouki

Ryusuke is a junior high school student living in Tokyo. During his summer vacation, he visits Tokushima and reunites with his teenage cousin, Tomomi. Ryusuke and Tomomi go outing to the Anabuki River where they get swept away by the rushing current. As they sink to the bottom of the river, a dragon appears, rescues them, and takes them to a mysterious old man. The old man tells Ryusuke and Tomomi that they are already dead, but that he can send them back to life if they explore the spirit world and find their mission in life. Although perplexed with the situation, Ryusuke and Tomomi decide to begin their journey to the spirit world. First, they arrive in a gloomy town that looks like it’s from the 1960’s. Soon after, they are assailed by terrible things one after another. They see fear-ridden rogues killing one another and doctors mutilating patients. People die and rise. They get killed and rise again. Ryusuke and Tomomi realize that they are in hell. But their journey doesn’t end there. The adventure beyond this world continues into the unknown. Will they be able to find their mission in life? (Source: dragonheart-movie.com)

StudioHS Pictures Studio

Tabekko Doubutsu The Movie

Dream Animals The Movie

185 0 20250501 Tabekko Doubutsu The Movie
May 1, 2025 1 ep, 90 min
Action Adventure Fantasy
Tabekko Doubutsu The Movie

It begins in Sweetsland: The home of the Dream Animals that has been taken over by cotton candy. The Tabekko Doubutsu find themselves being chased by the cotton candy army of King Gotton, who has banned all other sweets as part of his plan to take over the world. In their rush to escape, Pegasus ends up caught by the sticky soldiers! The animals make sparkly eyes at Profession Macaron begging him to help, but their lack of battle strength paired with not knowing how to do anything but be cute to solve all of their problems, the stress of being on the run from King Gotton strains the bonds of their friendship. Lion is discouraged by the seemingly impossible mission to rescue Pegasus, but some advice from Elephant gives him the courage he needs to act! But will it be enough to defeat King Gotton and his cotton candy army and save Pegasus — and the world?! (Source: Marza Animation Planet, edited)

Tamaranai no wa Koi nano ka

7495 7.13 20250406 Tamaranai no wa Koi nano ka
Apr 6, 2025 1 ep, 13 min
Boys Love
Tamaranai no wa Koi nano ka

Misuzu was branded a delinquent when a small incident left him isolated. But one day, he sees the top student, Kitahara, get surrounded by bullies and decides to help him out. That sparked Kitahara's interest in the lonely boy, but Misuzu pushes Kitahara away. "If you get involved with me, you'll get ostracized by everyone else too." But it won't take long for Misuzu's resolve to falter... (Source: Kodansha USA)
